platformPreview.lessonSubtitle: The zones where institutions place their orders.
intro: Many traders use Order Blocks without really knowing what they represent. Result: they identify them poorly, play them at the wrong time, or confuse them with other zones.

An Order Block is the **last opposite candle** before a violent expansion move. Its power comes from the fact that institutions haven't finished filling their orders at that level, and will likely come back to test it before continuing the move.
For an OB to be valid, it must respect **3 specific conditions** that most traders ignore: the first one is…

transformation.label: ★ Time to decide
transformation.titlePrefix: What are you going to do

choiceA.label: OPTION A
choiceA.body: Are you really sure you want to close this tab and keep doing exactly what you're doing today? Watching one more YouTube video. Following a Telegram guru promising you €5K/month. Tomorrow will be like today.

choiceB.label: OPTION B
choiceB.body: Or do you decide it's time to really get serious? Learn properly. Practice. Progress. With a real method, at your pace, to maximize your chances of succeeding.
